title: Consistency rule ?
author: ExaminationIcy4486
selftext:
Why prop keep including consistency rules ? 

Is it good for traders and helping prop firm to find real trader and help them to stay away from gamblers or it just a prop firm rule to trap traders and getting more and more money from traders ? 

Or does it is important for the sustainability for the prop firms ?

comments.author: QuirkyChipmunk1414
comments.body: It’s both. From the firm side, consistency rules filter out gamblers and protect their risk model. From the trader side, it forces you to manage size and avoid “one big trade” mentality. Most people fail them because they spike risk trying to pass faster. In reality, consistency is closer to how real capital is managed. I track my risk distribution with tools like alphamind ai to make sure I’m not just hitting targets randomly.

comments.author: ExaminationIcy4486
comments.body: Well exactly I understand point thank for the answer mate
